hero_section.headline: Stop Playing Calendar Tetris Across Time Zones
hero_section.subheadline: The scheduling tool that instantly finds meeting times everyone can actually attend—no more endless Slack threads asking 'when works for you?'
hero_section.supporting_text: Free for 14 days. No credit card required. Setup in 2 minutes.

pain_points.title: The Timezone Nightmare
pain_points.description: You're juggling 5 different time zones, manually calculating what 2pm EST means in Sydney, only to realize half your team is asleep.

pain_points.title: The Endless Back-and-Forth
pain_points.description: Twelve Slack messages later, three Doodle polls, and two rescheduled meetings—and you still haven't found a time that works for everyone.

pain_points.title: The Calendar Chaos
pain_points.description: You're switching between four different calendars, trying to remember who's on vacation, who has flexible hours, and who absolutely cannot do Mondays before 10am.

steps.title: Connect Your Calendar
steps.description: Link your Google, Outlook, or Apple calendar in seconds. We sync with your existing setup—no migration needed.

steps.title: Set Your Preferences Once
steps.description: Tell us your timezone, working hours, and meeting preferences. Your team does the same. Done.

steps.title: Get Instant Meeting Times
steps.description: Our AI analyzes everyone's availability and suggests optimal times that work across all time zones. Your team just clicks 'yes.'

features_section.headline: Everything You Need to Schedule Smarter

features.title: Smart Timezone Detection
features.description: Automatically converts and displays meeting times in each participant's local timezone. No more mental math or timezone converter tabs.

features.title: Team Availability Insights
features.description: See at-a-glance when your entire team is available. Filter by department, project, or custom groups to find overlap instantly.

features.title: Preference-Based Scheduling
features.description: Respects individual working hours, focus time blocks, and meeting preferences. Never accidentally schedule someone at 3am again.

features.title: One-Click Rescheduling
features.description: Plans change? Instantly find alternative times without starting the coordination dance from scratch. Everyone gets notified automatically.

features.title: Calendar Sync Across Platforms
features.description: Works seamlessly with Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, and more. Meetings appear everywhere your team needs them.

social_proof_section.headline: Join 2,000+ Teams Who've Ditched the Scheduling Chaos

testimonials.quote: We used to spend the first 10 minutes of every project kickoff just trying to schedule the next meeting. Now it's instant. Our team saves at least 15 hours a week on coordination alone.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Managing a team across San Francisco, London, and Singapore was a nightmare. This tool actually understands that 9am means something different to everyone. Game changer.
testimonials.author: Marcus Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: I was drowning in 'when can we meet?' messages. Now I just share a link and the tool does the heavy lifting. I actually have time to do my actual job now.
testimonials.author: Priya Patel

stats.description: Less time spent on meeting coordination
Saved per team per week on average

final_cta_section.headline: Ready to Reclaim Your Time?
final_cta_section.subheadline: Join the distributed teams who've already said goodbye to scheduling chaos. Start your free trial today—no credit card required.

footer.tagline: The scheduling tool that works as hard as your distributed team does.
